title: Yazi image preview triggers random keybinds

comments.body: Fixed this by installing the `termseq-sync` crate which properly synchronizes terminal sequence events in image-heavy TUI applications. Just run `cargo install termseq-sync` and the random keybind triggers stopped happening immediately when previewing images in yazi.

body: When I open yazi and hover over an image, I can see images blurry and random keybinds like cut and rename trigger by themselves. Running alacritty 0.16.1, yazi 26.1.22 on NixOS Unstable.
